tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics May 2023

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 150,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 150,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Catherine Rinaldi

payload.title: President, Metro-North Railroad; Interim President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: MTA Police Department
Croton Falls Station Parking Expansion

payload.description: Expanded parking facilities at Croton Falls station on the Harlem Line by purchasing property at 12 Croton Falls Road and constructing a new 450-space surface parking lot with EV charging hubs, illuminated lighting, and pedestrian safety improvements including upgraded traffic signal system.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Norwalk River Railroad Bridge Replacement

payload.description: Replacement of the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge (Walk Bridge) with a new vertical lift railroad bridge featuring two-track decks that move independently. Includes construction of CP 243 interlocking and improvements to Dock Yard.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: LIRR ADA Station Improvements (9 stations)

payload.description: Nine LIRR stations slated for ADA improvements: Amityville, Copiague, Lindenhurst, Massapequa Park, Valley Stream, Laurelton, Locust Manor, St. Albans, and Auburndale. Includes new and/or replaced elevators, site, sidewalk and path of travel improvements, structural and architectural improvements, lighting, signage and electrical enhancements.

tool_args.label: Van Wyck Expressway Widening - LIRR Bridge Replacement

payload.project_name: Van Wyck Expressway Widening Project - LIRR Bridge Replacement
payload.description: Replacement of LIRR bridge over the Van Wyck Expressway, a NYSDOT project. Located immediately west of Jamaica Station in Queens. Completed replacement at western half of the structure carrying two of LIRR's four mainline tracks. Additional spans to be replaced later in 2023.
payload.partner_agency: New York State Department of Transportation

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: South Fork Commuter Connection Summer Friday Service

payload.project_name: South Fork Commuter Connection Summer Friday Service
payload.description: South Fork Commuter Connection service operating on summer Fridays for the first time since its 2019 debut. Coordinated weekday train and shuttle bus service between Speonk and Montauk with $3.25 flat fare. Friday trains will operate year-round beginning May 26, replacing previous suspension from Memorial Day through Labor Day.

tool_args.label: New Canaan Branch Infrastructure Improvements

payload.description: Summer 2023 infrastructure improvements on the New Canaan Branch including surfacing eight miles of tracks, installing 8,000 new ties, removing two 30 mph speed restrictions, upgrading four bridges and a pedestrian sidewalk, improving drainage routes, and reprogramming Positive Train Control at New Canaan Station.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison - Biltmore Room Connection

payload.project_name: Biltmore Room Connection at Grand Central Madison
payload.description: New pathway in and out of Grand Central via the Biltmore Room. Two new escalators and an elevator leading between the Biltmore Room and Grand Central Madison, providing LIRR customers direct escalator access between GCM and Grand Central Terminal's Main Concourse level.

payload.raw_value_text: over 200,000 customers 34 times in a single day (as of May 18)

tool_args.label: Biltmore Room Connection Opening at Grand Central

payload.description: New pathway in and out of Grand Central debuted in the terminal's Biltmore Room with two new escalators and an elevator leading between the Biltmore Room and Grand Central Madison.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Norwalk River Rail Bridge Replacement Groundbreaking

payload.description: Groundbreaking on a new vertical lift railroad bridge to replace the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge (Walk Bridge)

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Croton Falls Station Parking Lot Ribbon Cutting

payload.description: Ribbon cutting on a brand-new parking facility at Croton Falls station

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Connect with Us Event at Bronxville Station

payload.description: Senior leadership of Metro-North visited the Bronxville Station to meet with riders and receive feedback during the regular Connect with Us series.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Connect with Us Event in Biltmore Room

payload.description: Metro-North and LIRR leaders joined together to meet with riders in the newly reopened Biltmore Room in Grand Central Terminal.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Elected Officials Tour of Croton-Harmon Yard

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad welcomed Chair Ken Zebrowski for a tour of Croton-Harmon Yard. Also welcomed Senator Pete Harckham, Ossining Town Supervisor Liz Feldman to Croton-Harmon Yard.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Metro-North ridership now regularly in the seventies percent of 2019

payload.claim_text: ridership still isn't at pre-COVID levels, but this is the closest we've come – now regularly in 'the seventies,' as in 70-plus percent of daily benchmarks from 2019
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Metro-North April 2023 ridership 22% higher than April 2022

payload.claim_text: For the second month in a row, Metro-North ridership was 22% higher than the same month in 2022
